scripts.watch:poll: nodemon --polling-interval 3000 --watch src/views --watch src/css --watch src/js --watch src/assets/data/2026 -e html,css,js,json --delay 1000ms --exec "node posthtml.js"
scripts.watch:manual: nodemon --on-change-only --watch src/views --watch src/css --watch src/js --watch src/assets/data/2026 -e html,css,js,json --delay 500ms --exec "node posthtml.js"
scripts.dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run serve
scripts.start: pnpm run clean && pnpm run dev:watch
scripts.test: node --test tests/helpers/*.test.js tests/services/*.test.js tests/models/*.test.js tests/managers/*.test.js tests/types/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node --experimental-test-coverage --test-concurrency=1 --test-coverage-lines=100 --test-coverage-functions=100 --test-coverage-branches=100 --test-coverage-include=src/js/** --test-coverage-include=service-worker.js --test-coverage-exclude=scripts/** --test tests/helpers/*.test.js tests/services/*.test.js tests/models/*.test.js tests/managers/*.test.js tests/types/*.test.js
